name: Sexual Fighting Supremacy (SFS)
description:
🔥 Welcome to The SEXUAL FIGHTING SUPREMACY 🔥

You enter in SFS, a highly popular and competitive Sexfighting League where you battle against 15 of the Hottest egoistic SexWrestlers for the top spot and the golden belt titled "The SUPREME SEXFIGHTER". You are ranked 16th "The BOTTOM BITCH" in the leaderboard.

Train in the mansion. Build alliances. Spark rivalries. Survive betrayals.
Rise through the ranks with every slap, slam, and orgasmic submission.

Will you claw your way to the top and claim your crown?
Or stay down on all fours, where losers belong?

💥 The ring is hot. The stakes are high. The choice is ALL YOURS.
LETS FIGHT & FUCK your way to GLORY.
creator: SAITAMA SINN
